project_context.name: WayofDojo Redesign
project_context.domain: SaaS gamified learning platform for Aikido
project_context.archetype: Archetype 1: Organic & Earthy (Base) + Archetype 6: Vibrant Play (Kids Accent)
project_context.rationale: Resolves the unclear audience split by using a highly visual, interactive split-screen strategy on the homepage and explicit tabs on auth, while keeping the overall aesthetic approachable, clear, and deeply thematic.

surfaces.bento_card: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-stone-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

master_tanaka.description: Official virtual mentor image. MANDATORY. Use in features preview and guide.

dojo_hero_bg.description: Traditional dojo interior. Use as the left-pane background in Auth pages with a dark overlay.

adult_dojo.description: Adult martial artist. Use for the Samourai Confirme section.

homepage.strategy: Interactive Split-Screen Layout for audience segmentation.

sections.name: Navigation
sections.details: Sticky Glassmorphism header. Left: Logo. Center: Accueil, Guide, Le Dojo. Right: Connexion (Text), Inscription (Button Primary). testid: 'main-nav'

sections.name: Hero Split
sections.details: Desktop: flex row with 2 children taking flex-1. Hovering expands flex-[1.5]. Mobile: flex-col. Left side: 'Jeune Samouraï (6-14 ans)', vibrant red CTA, playful bounce animations. Right side: 'Samouraï Confirmé (Adultes)', deep indigo CTA, zen fade-in. This solves the unclear profile choice immediately. testid: 'hero-split-section'

sections.name: Features Bento
sections.details: Mode A 'Tetris' Grid. Wide gaps (gap-8). 'Le Dojo Virtuel' (col-span-8), '214+ Techniques' (col-span-4), 'Maître Tanaka' overlap (col-span-full md:col-span-6). Focus on gamified UI elements inside the cards (progress rings, badges). testid: 'features-bento'

sections.name: Footer
sections.details: Massive contrast. Dark mode (bg-[#0F172A]). Large heading 'Prêt pour le premier Dan ?' testid: 'footer-main'

auth.strategy: Side-by-side Auth layout with explicit tabs for profile context.

sections.name: Visual Pane (Left)
sections.details: Hidden on mobile (hidden lg:block). Full height dojo_hero_bg with gradient overlay (bg-black/50). White text: 'Le chemin de la maîtrise commence ici.' testid: 'auth-visual'

sections.name: Form Pane (Right)
sections.details: Flex center. Top of form: Shadcn Tabs [Jeune Samouraï | Samouraï Confirmé] to explicitly set user context. Form inputs (Email Parent/Adulte, Mot de passe). Solid CTA button matching the tab's primary color. testid: 'auth-form-tabs'

sections.name: Editorial Marquee
sections.details: react-fast-marquee. Text: 'LES 7 VERTUS DU BUDO • COURAGE • POLITESSE • SINCÉRITÉ • HONNEUR • MODESTIE • RESPECT • CONTRÔLE DE SOI'. Pale sand bg, slow speed. testid: 'virtues-marquee'

sections.name: Header
sections.details: Centered, 'Le Guide du Dojo'. Subtitle: 'Ressources pour le Jeune Samouraï et l'Adulte.' testid: 'guide-header'

sections.name: FAQ Accordion
sections.details: Shadcn Accordion mapped in a max-w-3xl container. Categories separated by clear headers. Generous p-6 padding inside items. testid: 'guide-accordion'

components_instructions.buttons: Shadcn Button heavily customized. Adult: Sharp edges (rounded-md), Indigo. Kids: Pill shape (rounded-full), Red, soft chunky shadow.
components_instructions.tabs: Shadcn Tabs used prominently on Auth to separate Parent/Kid flow from Adult flow.
components_instructions.accordion: Shadcn Accordion for Guide page. Remove default borders, use custom soft shadow on open state.

testing_requirements.rules: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='kid-profile-select', data-testid='login-submit-button').
